conflicts.officialResolutionSearch: No CCP-14 erratum, circular, amendment, later official edition, or adopted correction resolving this passage was located in INVÍAS, MinTransporte, or SUIN searches on 2026-07-22.

passageA.locator: Section 3 PDF physical page 60, printed 3-56, Figure 3.10.4.1-1

passageB.locator: Section 3 PDF physical page 60, printed 3-56, T0 definition

conflicts.officialArchiveEvidence: The 16-entry official ZIP contains only PDFs. No CD image, spreadsheet, CSV, database, web-tool export, or municipality/locality table is present.
conflicts.officialText: Commentary C3.10.2.1 says PGA, Ss, and S1 values would be available on a CD and web tools.

conflicts.issue: MinTransporte listed a 9-24 April 2026 consultation proposal to modify CCP-2014 Section 13 (barriers). It is a proposal, not an adopted amendment, and it does not modify Section 3.

The preface discusses a 2% in 50 years / about 2500-year objective for critical bridges, while normative 3.10.2 routes lower exceedance probability/longer return period to a site-specific procedure. No official 2500-year selectable map/value dataset was found.
